---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do that ScholarMind doesn't support today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. If it's a new agent or connector, note where it fits in
the 4-layer architecture (interaction / orchestration / agent / knowledge-retrieval).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## Scope check

- [ ] Does this keep the "never cite from memory, always verify" guarantee intact?
- [ ] Does it stay Docker-free / embedded-Qdrant?
- [ ] Would it need a new dependency? Which one, and why?
